definition:
ἐπί-στασις, -εως, ἡ 
 (ἐφίστημι), [in LXX: 2Ma.6:3 * ;] 
  1. a stopping, halting (as of soldiers): ὄχλου, collecting a crowd (see Rack-ham, Acts, l.with): Act.24:12 (WH, Rec. ἐπισύστασις). 
   2. superintendence, attention (but see Thayer, see word; Field, Notes, 185 f.): 2Co.11:28 (WH, Rec. ut supr.).†
 (AS)
